case_title: REWARDS NETWORK ESTABLISHMENT SERVICES INC. VS. SCOTT HOLLEY

docket_entries.description: POS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF REWARDS NETWORK ESTABLISHMENT SERVICES INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REWARDS NETWORK ESTABLISHMENT SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT AS GURANTOR $117,546.81 PRINCIPAL, $1,188.35 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $119,185.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $8,433.78 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, M/D = 7/23/13 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REWARDS NETWORK ESTABLISHMENT SERVICES INC.
